title: Timezone picker
description: Searchable single-select for IANA timezone identifiers. Renders as HeroUI `ComboBox` (per the ui-components rule) with all identifiers from PHP's `\DateTimeZone::listIdentifiers()`. Options group by prefix (`Africa/*`, `America/*`, `Antarctica/*`, `Asia/*`, `Atlantic/*`, `Australia/*`, `Europe/*`, `Indian/*`, `Pacific/*`) via `ListBox.Section`. Consumed by the region create + edit screens, the user preferences screen (profile timezone override), and any admin flow that needs a timezone pick.
notes: Uses `ComboBox` — 400+ IANA identifiers require free-text search.
Rejects deprecated aliases (`US/Pacific`, `Canada/Eastern`) — only canonical forms are surfaced. The ValidIanaTimezone rule in strict mode enforces the same on writes.
Item renderer shows the identifier + current UTC offset + display name for the timezone (e.g. `America/Los_Angeles — UTC-08:00 (Pacific Standard Time)`).

The `preferredForCountry` prop biases the surfaced timezones — passing `AE` boosts `Asia/Dubai` to the top of the list. Consumed by the region create screen: when the country picker selects `AE`, the timezone picker biases toward Dubai.
For countries with a single timezone (UK, IE, AE), the timezone auto-fills but the user may still change it (e.g. a tenant's UK operation may prefer UTC display for internal reporting).

preferredForCountry.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. When set, the picker biases toward that country's timezones from `data/country-defaults.json.timezone_options` — pins them to the top of the list.

dataSources.name: timezones
dataSources.description: Returns `[{ identifier, region, city, utc_offset_minutes, display_name, is_deprecated }]` for every non-deprecated IANA identifier. Populated by the RegionServiceProvider from PHP's `\DateTimeZone::listIdentifiers()`.

dataSources.name: grouped
dataSources.description: Groups the flat timezone list into ordered sections. Section order: preferred (when preferredForCountry is set) → Africa → America → Antarctica → Asia → Atlantic → Australia → Europe → Indian → Pacific. Alphabetical by city within each section.

itemRenderer.propsExpr: { key: item.identifier, id: item.identifier, textValue: item.identifier + ' ' + item.display_name }
